title: Winner Winner Chicken Orzo Dinner
description: HelloFresh's beloved Hall of Fame recipe — herbed chicken breast baked over tender orzo with zucchini and tomatoes, topped with a crispy mozzarella and breadcrumb crust. A complete one-pan dinner that's earned its legendary status.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Dice zucchini into ½-inch pieces. Halve cherry tomatoes. Mince garlic.
In a large oven-safe skillet or baking dish (9x13), heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Add orzo, chicken broth, Italian seasoning, ½ tsp salt, and ¼ tsp pepper. Stir to combine. Bring to a simmer.
Add zucchini and cherry tomatoes to the orzo mixture and stir gently.
Season chicken breasts with remaining salt, pepper, and dried thyme. Nestle them on top of the orzo and vegetable mixture.
In a small bowl, combine mozzarella and panko. Sprinkle evenly over the chicken and vegetables.
Bake uncovered for 25–30 minutes, until chicken reaches 165°F, orzo is tender, and the topping is golden and bubbly.
Let rest 5 minutes. Garnish with fresh parsley and serve directly from the pan.
tips: Make sure the orzo is submerged in broth before baking — it absorbs the liquid as it cooks.
If the topping browns too quickly, tent loosely with foil for the last 10 minutes.
Add a pinch of red pepper flakes to the orzo for a little heat.
Swap zucchini for yellow squash or spinach depending on what you have on hand.
